Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Shuffles]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — Shuffles is a dark figure with black eyes and stubby wings.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — Shuffles has a nest of tentacles on its mouth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — Shuffles is a Bellowing Horror.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 5''' — Shuffles is a creature kept in a darkened cage that can talk in its sleep.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 7''' — Shuffles is a creature with black eyes and tentacles.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 7''' — Shuffles is a creature with tentacles that eats worms.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 9''' — Shuffles is a creature that mostly sleeps during the day.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 9''' — Shuffles are creatures that live alongside Calder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 17''' — Shuffles is a creature that can fly and mimics sounds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 18''' — Shuffles can fly and echo speech.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 19''' — Shuffles has wings that buzz like a hummingbird's.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 19''' — Shuffles can growl with the voice of a malevolent earthquake.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 21''' — Shuffles is a monstrosity with wings, tentacles for a mouth, and eyes that glare black hate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 21''' — Shuffles has a deep and masculine laugh.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 24''' — Shuffles is a creature with a tentacle-mouth and wings.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 25''' — Shuffles is a creature that repeats what others say.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 27''' — Shuffles follows Calder and flaps along behind him.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 7''' — Shuffles is a creature that lives in a cage and laughs when danger is imminent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 12''' — Calder received Shuffles as a pet when he was a child.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 13''' — Shuffles is an Elderspawn with a bat-winged shape that interacts with Calder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 20''' — Shuffles was gnawing on a fishbone in the rigging.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 21''' — Shuffles is an Elderspawn with a deep, booming voice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 21''' — Shuffles joins in with rumbling laughter.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 23''' — Shuffles are lesser Elderspawn with little intelligence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 24''' — Shuffles is a pudgy green monster that can speak in a resonant masculine voice.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 14''' — Shuffles is a creature with leathery wings and tendrils that rests on Calder's shoulder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 15''' — Shuffles fluttered down to land on Calder's shoulder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 16''' — Shuffles is a spawn of Othaghor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 20''' — Shuffles is a creature that appears to Calder and can speak.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 22''' — Shuffles is a character who can shout and slap Calder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — Shuffles shouted in Calder’s ear.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — Shuffles is a character who bellowed 'TOO LATE'.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 24''' — Shuffles rides on the railing and has wings.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 24''' — Shuffles is a creature that landed on Calder's shoulder and screams.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 26''' — Shuffles is a creature that does not feel time like humans.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 26''' — Shuffles has the ability to unlatch cages through bars.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 26''' — Shuffles can use words to exert power.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
